mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAFFIC_DB_SPEED_BUCKET ( pool_type, owner_id, app_id, bucket_epoch_sec, used_bytes, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{poolType}, #{ownerId}, #{appId}, #{bucketEpochSec}, #{usedBytes}, NOW(6), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE used_bytes = used_bytes + VALUES(used_bytes), updated_at = NOW(6)
